reviews.review_msg: I wanted to post a blank page for his exams since that was how much he taught us. Truly he is smart how else might I justify "teaching" a class for two weeks and telling stories and using cases from the internet. I am grateful to him as he helped me understand the meaning of the word "hypocrisy". You wont learn but you will enjoy a standup show

He's one of the best professors in finance out there. First, he's got industry experience and second, he's shrewd and smart. There's a lot in him worth looking up to. His course is entirely application based and that's why it's very engaging. You're never going to get bored in his class. Just make sure to read/study the cases.

He is the best finance prof ever, although he is sooo rude in the very first class. As long as you read before class and really participate in the class, you will learn a lot for sure. He will always open to questions and answer these questions patiently. Be prepared he will go after you if you check you phone during the lecture.

This is one really poor instructor in the whole universe of simon fraser university. It is astounding that someone with this low level of knowledge and rude personality can be accepted as a teacher at any university. He often goes off topic if he is challenged or equally he will try to use his assertive power to shut the conversation and penalize

Very knowledgeable and engaging. Moves very fast through content Things to look out for: - Get the readings done before class or your are unable to follow. - Don't even dare to have your phone or laptop on the desk. He'll go after you... Grading was in most parts about presentation, despite this being a finance course. Solid numbers didn't count...

Very challenging course. Very practical course. I learned a lot. You must do a lot of homework before going to lecture. Custom textbook is 30 dollars, just two chapters from a book that sells for less than 50 dollars online.

Brilliant teacher! Jan is very knowledgeable and enthusiastic about the topics he taught us in class. Relating course material to real world events is also very helpful. I learned a great deal in his course. Preparation before class is essential to get the most out of his lectures. His teaching style is for mature students who inspire to learn.
Brilliant professor who challenges his students to elevate their thinking and analysis.
Best prof ever, don't think the other student who scored him know what it's about.

He gives many papers to read. Then in class he is a showman, just talk and relate stories. You absolutely learn nothing from his class. You leave the semester with realizing that you waste your time in that course. He mistaken the school and class with military camp and students with soldiers. Treat students like they worth nothing.

This is the worst teacher of my education career. I have never had a teacher as bad as this one. I had the Bus866 in Fall2014 and that was my worst nightmare. The course is easy, but he is so disrespectful towards students. He make you sit in the class and control your attendance. If you have to leave (washroom), he might not let you!
